scripts.build:sidecar: cd ../ && python3 -m pip install pyinstaller --break-system-packages && python3 -m PyInstaller --onefile --name anicat-server web/src-tauri/binaries/anicat-server.py && mkdir -p web/src-tauri/binaries && cp dist/anicat-server web/src-tauri/binaries/anicat-server-$(uname -m)-apple-darwin
scripts.dev:full: npm run build:sidecar && npm run tauri dev
